id: stream

description: "Each event is wrapped in `PersonaEvent<E>` containing the source `personaId`."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Subscribe to a combined SSE stream of events from ALL personas."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/personas/stream"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Each event is wrapped in `PersonaEvent<E>` containing the source `personaId`.
Includes `persona-deleted` events that are not available on per-persona streams.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./stream.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
